title: 1 - (2-Quinolylazo)-2-acenaphthylenol (QAAc) as a Selective and Sensitive Chromogenic Reagent for Microdetermination of Palladium (II)
author: ISHWAR SINGH
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, University of Delhi, Delhi-110007 

  Manuscript received 10 March 1976, revised 16 August 1976, accepted 7 January 1977  

 Palladium forms two coloured complexes, viz., green and red, with 1-(2-quinolylazo)-2-acenaphthylenol, at low and high  p H's respectively. The green (1: 1) complex has an absorbance maximum at 670 nm with the sensitivity of 0.0075  \(\mu\) g cm 2 . The red (1: 2) complex exhibits maximum absorbance at 550 nm and the sensitivity of the colour reaction is 0.004:9  \(\mu\) g/cm 2 . The reagent has been employed for microdetermination of palladium in synthetic solutions containing other metals present in alloys.
